info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request PUT \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/view/%7BviewId%7D/order \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"anchorId":"string","position":"before"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"anchorId\":\"string\",\"position\":\"before\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("PUT", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/view/%7BviewId%7D/order", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

get.description: Getting associated records for a view filter configuration.

200.description: Returns the view to filter the configured records.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/view/%7BviewId%7D/filter-link-records \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/view/%7BviewId%7D/filter-link-records", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

rowHeight.description: The row height level of row in view

fieldNameDisplayLines.description: The field name display lines in view

frozenColumnCount.description: The frozen column count in view. Deprecated: this field will be removed in a future release and may no longer take effect.

frozenFieldId.description: Freeze to the right side of this field id in grid view

stackFieldId.description: The field id of the Kanban stack.

coverFieldId.description: The cover field id is a designated attachment field id, the contents of which appear at the top of each Kanban card.

isCoverFit.description: If true, cover images are resized to fit Kanban cards.

isFieldNameHidden.description: If true, hides field name in the Kanban cards.

isEmptyStackHidden.description: If true, hides empty stacks in the Kanban.

coverFieldId.description: The cover field id is a designated attachment field id, the contents of which appear at the top of each gallery card.

isCoverFit.description: If true, cover images are resized to fit gallery cards.

isFieldNameHidden.description: If true, hides field name in the gallery cards.

coverUrl.description: The cover url of the form

logoUrl.description: The logo url of the form

submitLabel.description: The submit button text of the form

filter.description: A filter object for complex query conditions based on fields, operators, and values. Use our visual query builder at https://app.teable.ai/developer/tool/query-builder to build filters.

order.description: Order is a floating number, column will sort by it in the view.

hidden.description: If column hidden in the view.

statisticFunc.description: Statistic function of the column in the view.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/view \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"name":"string","type":"grid","description":"string","order":0,"options":{"rowHeight":"short","fieldNameDisplayLines":1,"frozenColumnCount":0,"frozenFieldId":"string"},"sort":{"sortObjs":[{"fieldId":"string","order":"asc"}],"manualSort":true},"filter":{},"group":[{"fieldId":"string","order":"asc"}],"isLocked":true,"shareId":"string","enableShare":true,"shareMeta":{"allowCopy":true,"includeHiddenField":true,"password":"string","includeRecords":true,"submit":{"allow":true,"requireLogin":true}},"columnMeta":{"property1":{"order":0,"width":0,"hidden":true,"statisticFunc":"count"},"property2":{"order":0,"width":0,"hidden":true,"statisticFunc":"count"}}}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"name\":\"string\",\"type\":\"grid\",\"description\":\"string\",\"order\":0,\"options\":{\"rowHeight\":\"short\",\"fieldNameDisplayLines\":1,\"frozenColumnCount\":0,\"frozenFieldId\":\"string\"},\"sort\":{\"sortObjs\":[{\"fieldId\":\"string\",\"order\":\"asc\"}],\"manualSort\":true},\"filter\":{},\"group\":[{\"fieldId\":\"string\",\"order\":\"asc\"}],\"isLocked\":true,\"shareId\":\"string\",\"enableShare\":true,\"shareMeta\":{\"allowCopy\":true,\"includeHiddenField\":true,\"password\":\"string\",\"includeRecords\":true,\"submit\":{\"allow\":true,\"requireLogin\":true}},\"columnMeta\":{\"property1\":{\"order\":0,\"width\":0,\"hidden\":true,\"statisticFunc\":\"count\"},\"property2\":{\"order\":0,\"width\":0,\"hidden\":true,\"statisticFunc\":\"count\"}}}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/view", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

post.description: Install a plugin to a view

201.description: Returns data about the installed plugin.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/view/plugin \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"name":"string","pluginId":"string"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"name\":\"string\",\"pluginId\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",

patch.description: Update storage of a plugin in a view

200.description: Returns data about the updated plugin.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request PATCH \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/view/%7BviewId%7D/plugin/%7BpluginInstallId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"storage":{"property1":null,"property2":null}}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"storage\":{\"property1\":null,\"property2\":null}}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("PATCH", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/view/%7BviewId%7D/plugin/%7BpluginInstallId%7D", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

get.description: Get a view install plugin by id

200.description: Returns data about the view install plugin.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/view/%7BviewId%7D/plugin \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/view/%7BviewId%7D/plugin", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

put.description: Update the locked status of the view

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request PUT \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/view/%7BviewId%7D/locked \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"isLocked":true}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"isLocked\":true}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("PUT", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/view/%7BviewId%7D/locked", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/view/%7BviewId%7D/duplicate \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"name":"string","type":"grid","description":"string","order":0,"options":{"rowHeight":"short","fieldNameDisplayLines":1,"frozenColumnCount":0,"frozenFieldId":"string"},"sort":{"sortObjs":[{"fieldId":"string","order":"asc"}],"manualSort":true},"filter":{},"group":[{"fieldId":"string","order":"asc"}],"isLocked":true,"shareId":"string","enableShare":true,"shareMeta":{"allowCopy":true,"includeHiddenField":true,"password":"string","includeRecords":true,"submit":{"allow":true,"requireLogin":true}},"columnMeta":{"property1":{"order":0,"width":0,"hidden":true,"statisticFunc":"count"},"property2":{"order":0,"width":0,"hidden":true,"statisticFunc":"count"}}}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"name\":\"string\",\"type\":\"grid\",\"description\":\"string\",\"order\":0,\"options\":{\"rowHeight\":\"short\",\"fieldNameDisplayLines\":1,\"frozenColumnCount\":0,\"frozenFieldId\":\"string\"},\"sort\":{\"sortObjs\":[{\"fieldId\":\"string\",\"order\":\"asc\"}],\"manualSort\":true},\"filter\":{},\"group\":[{\"fieldId\":\"string\",\"order\":\"asc\"}],\"isLocked\":true,\"shareId\":\"string\",\"enableShare\":true,\"shareMeta\":{\"allowCopy\":true,\"includeHiddenField\":true,\"password\":\"string\",\"includeRecords\":true,\"submit\":{\"allow\":true,\"requireLogin\":true}},\"columnMeta\":{\"property1\":{\"order\":0,\"width\":0,\"hidden\":true,\"statisticFunc\":\"count\"},\"property2\":{\"order\":0,\"width\":0,\"hidden\":true,\"statisticFunc\":\"count\"}}}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/table/%7BtableId%7D/view/%7BviewId%7D/duplicate", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))
